description: Radiology and medical imaging vocabulary. Root 164068 (Imaging modalities) is CIEL's ConvSet covering all standard imaging modality types used for procedure ordering and reporting — plain X-ray, CT, MRI, ultrasound, fluoroscopy, nuclear medicine, PET, and mammography. This set is the CIEL-available foundation; a full imaging procedure catalogue (e.g. individual study types per body region) requires Tabibu-authored ConvSets referencing the 130 CIEL Radiology/Imaging Procedure concepts — tracked as Path B curation work.

notes.164068: Imaging modalities (ConvSet) — coded answer set covering all imaging modality types used in radiology ordering and result classification (~15 modality concepts: CT, MRI, X-ray, ultrasound, fluoroscopy, nuclear medicine, PET, mammography, etc.)
